_redaction: Public-safe module snapshot grid. Context-only bundled samples that demonstrate the SHAPE of the Pantheon Research system. No live proprietary data, no private DB URLs, no provider secrets. The LLM-comparison and data-quality cards are computed live in-process from bundled samples.

modules.title: Macro Regime
modules.what_not_to_infer: Not a live macro nowcast; the public repo ships a static illustrative snapshot, not the production regime model.
modules.headline: Regime: Late-cycle / disinflationary (illustrative)

modules.title: Market Pulse / TA
modules.what_not_to_infer: Not a trading signal; TA context only, and only for names inside the production universe. No buy/sell recommendation.
modules.headline: Breadth neutral, momentum cooling (illustrative)

modules.title: Commodity
modules.role: Commodity stance + forward-validation shadow (spot join) — production surface: /commodity
modules.what_not_to_infer: No fair-value band is published here; editorial + FV-band variants stay BLOCKED in production. Stance is context, not a price target.
modules.headline: Energy stance: balanced; validation warming up (illustrative)

modules.title: Fixed Income
modules.role: Rates/curve stance with PIT signal + REVISED forward-leg basis — production surface: /fi
modules.what_not_to_infer: Signal is point-in-time; the forward leg is REVISED (not PIT). Do not read the forward leg as a no-lookahead realized outcome.
modules.headline: Duration: neutral-to-long bias (illustrative)

modules.title: FX
modules.role: FX overlay + forward-validation (PIT signal) — production surface: /fx
modules.what_not_to_infer: Carry legs can be blocked upstream (e.g. missing benchmark); a SIGNAL_ONLY state means the forward outcome is not yet joined.
modules.headline: USD bias: mild-strong; carry SIGNAL_ONLY (illustrative)

modules.title: Ticker Profile
modules.role: Equity cockpit: evidence pack + dual-LLM overlay — production surface: /equity/ticker-profile
modules.what_not_to_infer: Bundled demo tickers only (MA, NVDA); the full universe and live fundamentals stay private.
modules.headline: 2 demo tickers with hashed evidence packs

modules.title: Qwen vs DeepSeek
modules.role: Dual-LLM qualitative overlay comparison — the hackathon centerpiece
modules.what_not_to_infer: Agreement is not accuracy; low agreement / a major divergence routes to human review, never to a trade.
modules.headline: Live-computed from samples (see grid for real state)

modules.title: Data Quality
modules.role: Research-Ops governance snapshot (coverage, provider config, per-ticker state) — production surface: Research Ops admin plane
modules.what_not_to_infer: This is a read-only public slice; no admin actions, mutations, or secrets are exposed.
modules.headline: Coverage + fail-closed accounting
